channel.title: GameVolt News
channel.description: New game launches, major updates and features from GameVolt — free original browser games.

item.title: Connect 4 goes online — play a friend with a room code
item.description: Connect 4 now has online multiplayer. Create a room, share the 4-character code, and play a friend on any device — no signup, no app — plus rematches in the same room.

item.title: Breakout: Neon Drift — the brick breaker with a twist
item.description: Our Breakout overhaul is live. Neon Drift adds the Perfect Drift skill-shot — slide the paddle into the ball to curve and aim your shot — plus a synthwave-arcade look, power-ups, a neon final boss, 31 trophies and a global leaderboard.

item.title: Axeluga leveled up: local & global leaderboards and gamepad-friendly menus
item.description: Axeluga — our neon retro-arcade shoot-em-up — gets a LOCAL/GLOBAL leaderboard, fairer skill-based scoring so clean clears no longer tie, and modernized Achievements/Scores menus you can fully navigate with keyboard and gamepad.

item.title: Signing in is now simpler — Google or a quick email code
item.description: GameVolt's sign-in is reworked: no passwords, just one tap with Google or a quick one-time email code. Trophies, high scores and saves now sync across phone, tablet and desktop, and the code works inside the installed home-screen app.

item.title: Vector Hexagon is live — our new twitch survival game
item.description: One cursor, six lanes, walls closing in. Our Super Hexagon-inspired reflex game launches with a three-tier climb mode, endless mode, signature wall patterns, 31 trophies and a global leaderboard — free in your browser, no download.

item.title: Snake Neo update: 31 trophies and global high scores
item.description: Snake Neo joins the full GameVolt experience — 31 unlockable trophies with in-game toasts, local and global high score boards, and cloud sync when you sign in.
